subcodes.title: Words to Wilson, Engelhorn, Stewart, Brittingham, spoken around 1909-10-23
subcodes.first_line: If for a thousand years a man takes food, and nourishes his body, yet if for two or three days that nourishment ceases, his body will become weakened
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @divine emanation is ceaseless; eternal, @day of Resurrection; Judgement, @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @Manifestation of God as sun
